name: recall-inbox
description: A personal inbox for saved items from X bookmarks, GitHub stars, and more.

scripts.cf:migrate: node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.cf:migrate:local: node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.cf:deploy: tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build && node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs deploy
scripts.cf:release: tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build && node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs d1 migrations apply DB --remote && node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs deploy
